title: Record: 10L QAT + SwiGLU + BigramHash(10240) (val_bpb=TBD)
body:
## Summary

- **QAT (Quantization-Aware Training):** STE-based QAT during training with int5 clip for MLP, int6 clip for attention — eliminates quantization gap at inference
- **SwiGLU activation:** Replaces relu² with SiLU-gated linear unit, parameter-matched hidden dim (2/3 × mlp_mult × model_dim)
- **Mixed int5/int6 + zstd-22 quantization:** int5 for MLP weights, int6 for attention, FP16 for embeddings

Architecture: 10 layers, 512 dim, 8 heads, 4 KV heads (GQA), BigramHash(10240), SmearGate, SWA start_frac=0.4, WD=0.04, warmdown=3000, OrthoInit + muP-scaled projections.

Pending 3-seed validation on 8×H100.
